notes:
Stay-fresh fix: OPTiC no longer goes stale in the background, so no more restarting every day to keep alerts and the server switch working.
Scout Target Alerts: get a Discord ping the moment you scout a city that is capturable, low on troops, or sitting on a pile of resources.
Attack alerts now ignore your own hero-leveling and trebbing - set a troop floor and only real hits page you.
Deeper scout reports: every troop type, all fortifications and gold, with a full breakdown when you click a report.
